title: Legislative Decree No. 48 of 2002 Promulgating the Telecommunications Law
summary: Provides the legal basis for licensing telecommunications networks and services, use of radio spectrum, radiocommunications equipment controls, TRA regulatory powers, and connected-device obligations where IoT services rely on public networks or spectrum.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Core telecom law governing networks, radiocommunications, spectrum and licensing.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Core law governing Bahrain telecommunications markets and licensing.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Core law governing telecommunications networks and services including internet-enabled communications.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.internet_: Telecommunications law supporting domain-name and numbering-resource governance.

notes: Related instruments: Implemented through TRA licensing, spectrum, type approval, numbering and regulatory instruments
